index.connectVisionSync: Connect Vision-Sync to our specialized AI Sales platform. Automate your entire sales funnel, from lead generation and qualifying conversations to meeting bookings and follow-ups.
index.selectModulesDesc: Select and integrate specialized intelligence nodes to construct a bespoke ecosystem tailored precisely to your operational needs.

footer.tagline: "Design. Automate. Scale. Sync your vision with the future."
footer.notifyUpdate: Get notified about new AI modules and platform updates.
footer.newsletterAdded: You've been added to our newsletter.

pricing.title: Transparent, Scaleable Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the foundational platform tier that fits your growth stage, then layer on AI modules as your operational needs evolve.

fallback.enterpriseDesc: Complete operational control and unlimited scalability.

platform.title: Meet Your New Digital Team
platform.subtitle: Vision-Sync makes Artificial Intelligence accessible, safe, and easy to use. Think of us as your digital workforce that never sleeps—ready to help with repetitive tasks so your human team can focus on what they do best.
platform.feature1Desc: Deploy virtual assistants that actually learn your business. Unlike frustrating, robotic chatbots, our AI helpers can understand context, hold natural conversations, and complete real tasks for you.
platform.feature2Desc: Don't worry about migrating your data. Vision-Sync securely plugs into the software you already use every day. We keep your information private, encrypted, and completely secure.
platform.feature3Desc: Say goodbye to tedious manual data entry. Our platform can automatically handle routine chores—like sorting new leads, organizing emails, or answering common customer questions—while you sleep.
platform.feature4Desc: No rogue AI here. Every single action our digital assistants take can be set to require your human approval first. You have complete visibility and you always hold the keys.
platform.growBannerDesc: Start simple with just one smart AI assistant. As you become more comfortable, you can easily add more skills and capabilities from our growing library.

solutions.title: Ready-to-Use AI Blueprints
solutions.subtitle: Not sure where to start with AI? We've created simple, pre-built packages tailored for your industry that plug right into your business.
solutions.fallbackDesc: A simple, ready-to-use AI workflow designed specifically to make your daily operations smoother and faster.

fallback.hubDesc: A friendly AI assistant that automatically replies to common customer questions, tracks lost orders, and routes complex issues to your human team.
fallback.leadSummary: Automatically qualify and book meetings with new leads.
fallback.leadDesc: Stop letting good leads slip away. This workflow instantly replies to website inquiries, asks simple questions to understand the customer's needs, and books verified meetings on your calendar.
fallback.teamSummary: Help employees find company answers instantly.
fallback.teamDesc: A secure, private assistant that connects to your company knowledge base. Your team can ask questions about HR policies, tech support, or project details and get instant, accurate answers.

modules.title: Pick Your AI Superpowers
modules.subtitle: Add new skills to your business just like installing apps on your phone. Browse our library of ready-to-use AI helpers.
modules.fallbackDesc: Add this specific skill to your AI assistant to handle this task completely automatically.

fallback.emailShort: Drafts replies and organizes your inbox.
fallback.emailLong: Connects to your business email to automatically sort incoming messages, flag urgent ones, and draft polite, accurate responses for your review.
fallback.webShort: A smart chat widget that actually helps.
fallback.webLong: Add a helpful assistant to your website that can guide visitors to the right products, answer pricing questions, or capture their contact information.
fallback.dataLong: When a new customer signs up on your website, this skill automatically adds them to your CRM, emails your team, and updates your spreadsheets without you lifting a finger.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's discuss your project and explore how we can help you succeed.
contact.infoSubtitle: Tell us about yourself and your organization
contact.inquirySubtitle: Help us understand what you're looking for
contact.scopeSubtitle: Tell us about your budget, timeline, and requirements
contact.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your specific requirements, goals, or questions in detail...

contact.next1: • Our team will review your inquiry
contact.next3: • Expect to hear from us within 24 hours
contact.aiSubtitle: Get instant answers about our services while you fill out the form
